---
canvas:
  title: "Classic Quiz — Checklist Answers"
  quiz_type: practice_quiz
  published: true
  shuffle_answers: true
  show_correct_answers: true
  allowed_attempts: -1
---

:::: {.question name="Addition"}

  What is 2 + 2?

  - [x] 4
  - [ ] 3
  - [ ] 5
  - [ ] 6

  ::: correct-comment
  Well done!
  :::

  ::: incorrect-comment
  Try again. Think about basic arithmetic.
  :::

::::

:::: {.question name="Capital of France"}

  What is the capital of France?

  - [ ] London
  - [x] Paris
    - Correct! Paris is the capital.
  - [ ] Berlin
  - [ ] Rome

::::

:::: {.question name="Rich Div Answers" points=2}

  Which color is the sky on a clear day?

  ::: {.answer correct=true comment="Correct!"}
  **Blue** — the sky appears blue due to Rayleigh scattering.
  :::

  ::: {.answer comment="No, that is the color of grass."}
  Green
  :::

  ::: {.answer}
  Red
  :::

  ::: {.answer}
  Yellow
  :::

::::
